'--- Excel VBA ---
Option Explicit

Private Type MR_TargetBox
    Left As Double
    Top As Double
    Width As Double
    Height As Double
    Source As String
End Type

Sub MR_FitPictures_KeepAspect()
    MR_FitPicturesToTargets True, True
End Sub

Sub MR_FitPictures_Fill()
    MR_FitPicturesToTargets False, True
End Sub

Sub MR_FitPictures_KeepAspect_WithCompressInfo()
    MR_FitPicturesToTargets True, False
    MR_ShowCompressInfo
End Sub

Sub MR_FitPictures_Fill_WithCompressInfo()
    MR_FitPicturesToTargets False, False
    MR_ShowCompressInfo
End Sub

Sub MR_ShowCompressInfo()
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim pictureCount As Long

    On Error Resume Next
    pictureCount = 0

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then
            pictureCount = pictureCount + 1
        End If
    Next shp

    If pictureCount > 0 Then
        MsgBox "Pictures found: " & pictureCount & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "To reduce file size, use File > Save As, then Picture Format > Compress Pictures.", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "No pictures found.", vbInformation
    End If

    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Private Sub MR_FitPicturesToTargets(Optional ByVal keepAspect As Boolean = True, Optional ByVal showMessage As Boolean = True)
    Const OVERLAP_THRESHOLD As Double = 0.15
    Const MAX_NEAREST_GAP As Double = 80

    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim selectedNames As Object
    Dim useSelection As Boolean
    Dim found As Boolean
    Dim placedCount As Long
    Dim skippedCount As Long

    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Set selectedNames = MR_GetSelectedShapeNames()
    useSelection = (selectedNames.Count > 0)

    MR_LogDebug "Start keepAspect=" & CStr(keepAspect) & _
                " showMessage=" & CStr(showMessage) & _
                " selectionCount=" & selectedNames.Count & _
                " workbook=" & ActiveWorkbook.Name & _
                " sheet=" & ActiveSheet.Name

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then
            If Not useSelection Or selectedNames.Exists(shp.Name) Then
                found = MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap(shp, target, OVERLAP_THRESHOLD)

                If Not found And useSelection Then
                    found = MR_FindNearestTarget(shp, target, MAX_NEAREST_GAP)
                End If

                If found Then
                    MR_LogDebug "Place picture=" & shp.Name & _
                                " target=" & target.Source & _
                                " img=" & MR_ShapeRectText(shp) & _
                                " targetRect=" & MR_TargetRectText(target)
                    If keepAspect Then
                        MR_PlaceKeepAspect shp, target
                    Else
                        MR_PlaceFill shp, target
                    End If
                    shp.ZOrder msoBringToFront
                    placedCount = placedCount + 1
                Else
                    MR_LogDebug "Skip picture=" & shp.Name & " no target img=" & MR_ShapeRectText(shp)
                    skippedCount = skippedCount + 1
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp

    MR_LogDebug "Finish placed=" & placedCount & " skipped=" & skippedCount

    If showMessage Then
        If placedCount > 0 Then
            MsgBox "Picture placement complete: " & placedCount & " moved." & _
                   IIf(skippedCount > 0, vbCrLf & "Skipped: " & skippedCount, ""), vbInformation
        Else
            MsgBox "No matching picture target found. Select a picture near or over a bordered cell/box shape, then run again.", vbExclamation
        End If
    End If

CleanExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub

ErrHandler:
    MR_LogDebug "Error " & Err.Number & ": " & Err.Description
    MsgBox "Error: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanExit
End Sub

Private Sub MR_LogDebug(ByVal message As String)
    On Error Resume Next

    Dim shell As Object
    Dim fso As Object
    Dim logFile As Object
    Dim logPath As String

    Set shell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
    logPath = shell.SpecialFolders("Desktop") & "\MacroRunner_excel_debug.log"
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    Set logFile = fso.OpenTextFile(logPath, 8, True, -1)
    logFile.WriteLine Format$(Now, "yyyy-mm-dd hh:nn:ss") & " [INFO] " & message
    logFile.Close
End Sub

Private Function MR_ShapeRectText(ByVal shp As Shape) As String
    MR_ShapeRectText = MR_RectText(shp.Left, shp.Top, shp.Width, shp.Height)
End Function

Private Function MR_TargetRectText(ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As String
    MR_TargetRectText = MR_RectText(target.Left, target.Top, target.Width, target.Height)
End Function

Private Function MR_RectText(ByVal leftValue As Double, ByVal topValue As Double, ByVal widthValue As Double, ByVal heightValue As Double) As String
    MR_RectText = "L=" & Format$(leftValue, "0.0") & _
                  " T=" & Format$(topValue, "0.0") & _
                  " W=" & Format$(widthValue, "0.0") & _
                  " H=" & Format$(heightValue, "0.0")
End Function

Private Function MR_GetSelectedShapeNames() As Object
    Dim names As Object
    Dim i As Long

    Set names = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

    On Error Resume Next
    For i = 1 To Selection.ShapeRange.Count
        names(Selection.ShapeRange(i).Name) = True
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0

    Set MR_GetSelectedShapeNames = names
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByVal threshold As Double) As Boolean
    Dim bestArea As Double
    Dim area As Double
    Dim score As Double
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox

    bestArea = 0
    MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = False

    If MR_FindBestCellTarget(img, target, area, score, threshold, True) Then
        bestArea = area
        result = target
        MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = True
    End If

    If MR_FindBestShapeTarget(img, target, area, score, threshold, True) Then
        If area > bestArea Then
            bestArea = area
            result = target
            MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = True
        End If
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_FindNearestTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByVal maxGap As Double) As Boolean
    Dim bestDistance As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim dummyScore As Double

    bestDistance = maxGap
    MR_FindNearestTarget = False

    If MR_FindBestCellTarget(img, target, distance, dummyScore, 0, False) Then
        If distance <= bestDistance Then
            bestDistance = distance
            result = target
            MR_FindNearestTarget = True
        End If
    End If

    If MR_FindBestShapeTarget(img, target, distance, dummyScore, 0, False) Then
        If distance <= bestDistance Then
            bestDistance = distance
            result = target
            MR_FindNearestTarget = True
        End If
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestCellTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByRef metric As Double, ByRef score As Double, ByVal threshold As Double, ByVal byOverlap As Boolean) As Boolean
    Dim usedRng As Range
    Dim cell As Range
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim seen As Object
    Dim key As String
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim area As Double
    Dim candidateScore As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim bestMetric As Double

    On Error Resume Next
    Set usedRng = ActiveSheet.UsedRange
    On Error GoTo 0

    If usedRng Is Nothing Then Exit Function

    Set seen = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    MR_FindBestCellTarget = False

    If byOverlap Then
        bestMetric = 0
    Else
        bestMetric = 1E+30
    End If

    For Each cell In usedRng.Cells
        Set rng = MR_EffectiveRange(cell)
        key = rng.Address(False, False)

        If Not seen.Exists(key) Then
            seen.Add key, True

            If MR_HasBoxBorder(rng) Then
                MR_TargetFromRange target, rng

                If byOverlap Then
                    area = MR_OverlapArea(img, target)
                    candidateScore = MR_OverlapScore(img, target, area)
                    If candidateScore >= threshold And area > bestMetric Then
                        bestMetric = area
                        metric = area
                        score = candidateScore
                        result = target
                        MR_FindBestCellTarget = True
                    End If
                Else
                    distance = MR_RectGapDistance(img, target)
                    If distance < bestMetric Then
                        bestMetric = distance
                        metric = distance
                        result = target
                        MR_FindBestCellTarget = True
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next cell
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestShapeTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByRef metric As Double, ByRef score As Double, ByVal threshold As Double, ByVal byOverlap As Boolean) As Boolean
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim area As Double
    Dim candidateScore As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim bestMetric As Double

    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = False

    If byOverlap Then
        bestMetric = 0
    Else
        bestMetric = 1E+30
    End If

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If shp.Name <> img.Name And MR_IsUsableTargetShape(shp, img) Then
            MR_TargetFromShape target, shp

            If byOverlap Then
                area = MR_OverlapArea(img, target)
                candidateScore = MR_OverlapScore(img, target, area)
                If candidateScore >= threshold And area > bestMetric Then
                    bestMetric = area
                    metric = area
                    score = candidateScore
                    result = target
                    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = True
                End If
            Else
                distance = MR_RectGapDistance(img, target)
                If distance < bestMetric Then
                    bestMetric = distance
                    metric = distance
                    result = target
                    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = True
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
End Function

Private Function MR_IsPictureShape(ByVal shp As Shape) As Boolean
    MR_IsPictureShape = (shp.Type = msoPicture Or shp.Type = msoLinkedPicture)
End Function

Private Function MR_IsUsableTargetShape(ByVal shp As Shape, ByVal img As Shape) As Boolean
    Dim targetArea As Double
    Dim imageArea As Double

    MR_IsUsableTargetShape = False

    If shp.Visible = msoFalse Then Exit Function
    If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then Exit Function
    If shp.Type = msoGroup Then Exit Function
    If shp.Width < 5 Or shp.Height < 5 Then Exit Function

    targetArea = shp.Width * shp.Height
    imageArea = img.Width * img.Height

    If imageArea > 0 Then
        If targetArea < imageArea * 0.25 Then Exit Function
        If targetArea > imageArea * 12 Then Exit Function
    End If

    MR_IsUsableTargetShape = True
End Function

Private Function MR_HasBoxBorder(ByVal rng As Range) As Boolean
    Dim hasLeft As Boolean
    Dim hasRight As Boolean
    Dim hasTop As Boolean
    Dim hasBottom As Boolean

    MR_HasBoxBorder = False

    On Error Resume Next
    hasLeft = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasRight = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasTop = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasBottom = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    On Error GoTo 0

    MR_HasBoxBorder = (hasLeft And hasRight And hasTop And hasBottom)
End Function

Private Function MR_EffectiveRange(ByVal cell As Range) As Range
    If cell.MergeCells Then
        Set MR_EffectiveRange = cell.MergeArea
    Else
        Set MR_EffectiveRange = cell
    End If
End Function

Private Sub MR_TargetFromRange(ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal rng As Range)
    target.Left = rng.Left
    target.Top = rng.Top
    target.Width = rng.Width
    target.Height = rng.Height
    target.Source = "cell"
End Sub

Private Sub MR_TargetFromShape(ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal shp As Shape)
    target.Left = shp.Left
    target.Top = shp.Top
    target.Width = shp.Width
    target.Height = shp.Height
    target.Source = "shape"
End Sub

Private Function MR_OverlapArea(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As Double
    Dim leftEdge As Double
    Dim topEdge As Double
    Dim rightEdge As Double
    Dim bottomEdge As Double
    Dim imgRight As Double
    Dim imgBottom As Double
    Dim targetRight As Double
    Dim targetBottom As Double

    imgRight = img.Left + img.Width
    imgBottom = img.Top + img.Height
    targetRight = target.Left + target.Width
    targetBottom = target.Top + target.Height

    If img.Left > target.Left Then leftEdge = img.Left Else leftEdge = target.Left
    If img.Top > target.Top Then topEdge = img.Top Else topEdge = target.Top
    If imgRight < targetRight Then rightEdge = imgRight Else rightEdge = targetRight
    If imgBottom < targetBottom Then bottomEdge = imgBottom Else bottomEdge = targetBottom

    If rightEdge > leftEdge And bottomEdge > topEdge Then
        MR_OverlapArea = (rightEdge - leftEdge) * (bottomEdge - topEdge)
    Else
        MR_OverlapArea = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_OverlapScore(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal area As Double) As Double
    Dim imageArea As Double
    Dim targetArea As Double
    Dim baseArea As Double

    imageArea = img.Width * img.Height
    targetArea = target.Width * target.Height
    baseArea = imageArea
    If targetArea < baseArea Then baseArea = targetArea

    If baseArea > 0 Then
        MR_OverlapScore = area / baseArea
    Else
        MR_OverlapScore = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_RectGapDistance(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As Double
    Dim dx As Double
    Dim dy As Double
    Dim imgRight As Double
    Dim imgBottom As Double
    Dim targetRight As Double
    Dim targetBottom As Double

    imgRight = img.Left + img.Width
    imgBottom = img.Top + img.Height
    targetRight = target.Left + target.Width
    targetBottom = target.Top + target.Height

    If imgRight < target.Left Then
        dx = target.Left - imgRight
    ElseIf targetRight < img.Left Then
        dx = img.Left - targetRight
    Else
        dx = 0
    End If

    If imgBottom < target.Top Then
        dy = target.Top - imgBottom
    ElseIf targetBottom < img.Top Then
        dy = img.Top - targetBottom
    Else
        dy = 0
    End If

    MR_RectGapDistance = Sqr(dx ^ 2 + dy ^ 2)
End Function

Private Sub MR_PlaceKeepAspect(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    Dim targetW As Double
    Dim targetH As Double
    Dim ratio As Double
    Dim newW As Double
    Dim newH As Double

    If shp.Height <= 0 Or target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    targetW = target.Width
    targetH = target.Height
    ratio = shp.Width / shp.Height

    If targetW / targetH > ratio Then
        newH = targetH
        newW = targetH * ratio
    Else
        newW = targetW
        newH = targetW / ratio
    End If

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
        .Width = newW
        .Height = newH
        .Left = target.Left + (targetW - newW) / 2
        .Top = target.Top + (targetH - newH) / 2
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub MR_PlaceFill(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    If target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
        .Width = target.Width
        .Height = target.Height
        .Left = target.Left
        .Top = target.Top
    End With
End Sub

'--- Excel VBA ---
Option Explicit

' 실행용 매크로 1: 비율 유지 모드 (권장)
Sub 실행_비율유지O()
    Call FitAllShapesToBestCell(True)
End Sub

' 실행용 매크로 2: 비율 무시하고 셀 전체 채우기
Sub 실행_비율유지X()
    Call FitAllShapesToBestCell(False)
End Sub

' --- 핵심 매크로 ---
Sub FitAllShapesToBestCell(Optional keepAspect As Boolean = True)

    Dim shp As Shape, cell As Range, rng As Range
    Dim usedRng As Range, maxOverlap As Double, curOverlap As Double
    Dim bestCell As Range

    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Set usedRng = ActiveSheet.UsedRange

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        maxOverlap = 0
        Set bestCell = Nothing

        ' 가장 많이 겹친 셀 찾기
        For Each cell In usedRng.Cells
            Set rng = GetEffectiveRange(cell)
            curOverlap = CalculateOverlap(shp, rng)
            
            If curOverlap > maxOverlap Then
                maxOverlap = curOverlap
                Set bestCell = rng
            End If
        Next cell

        ' 해당 셀로 도형 이동 및 크기 조정
        If Not bestCell Is Nothing Then
            If keepAspect Then
                FitShapeIntoCellKeepingAspect shp, bestCell
            Else
                FitShapeIntoCellFillFully shp, bestCell
            End If
        End If
    Next shp

    MsgBox "모든 도형을 셀에 맞춰 자동 배치 완료!", vbInformation
    GoTo CleanExit

ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "오류 발생: " & Err.Description, vbCritical

CleanExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
End Sub

' 병합 셀 감지
Private Function GetEffectiveRange(cell As Range) As Range
    If cell.MergeCells Then
        Set GetEffectiveRange = cell.MergeArea
    Else
        Set GetEffectiveRange = cell
    End If
End Function

' 겹치는 면적 계산
Private Function CalculateOverlap(shp As Shape, rng As Range) As Double
    Dim shpL#, shpT#, shpR#, shpB#
    Dim rngL#, rngT#, rngR#, rngB#
    Dim ow#, oh#

    shpL = shp.Left: shpT = shp.Top
    shpR = shp.Left + shp.Width
    shpB = shp.Top + shp.Height

    rngL = rng.Left: rngT = rng.Top
    rngR = rng.Left + rng.Width
    rngB = rng.Top + rng.Height

    ow = Application.Max(0, Application.Min(shpR, rngR) - Application.Max(shpL, rngL))
    oh = Application.Max(0, Application.Min(shpB, rngB) - Application.Max(shpT, rngT))

    CalculateOverlap = ow * oh
End Function

' ? 비율 유지하며 셀에 최대 크기로 도형 배치
Private Sub FitShapeIntoCellKeepingAspect(shp As Shape, cellRng As Range)

    Dim cellW#, cellH#, ratio#, newW#, newH#
    Dim offsetL#, offsetT#

    cellW = cellRng.Width
    cellH = cellRng.Height

    ratio = shp.Width / shp.Height

    If cellW / cellH > ratio Then
        newH = cellH
        newW = cellH * ratio
    Else
        newW = cellW
        newH = cellW / ratio
    End If

    offsetL = cellRng.Left + (cellW - newW) / 2
    offsetT = cellRng.Top + (cellH - newH) / 2

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
        .Left = offsetL
        .Top = offsetT
        .Width = newW
        .Height = newH
    End With
End Sub

' ?비율 무시하고 셀에 가득 채우기
Private Sub FitShapeIntoCellFillFully(shp As Shape, cellRng As Range)
    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
        .Left = cellRng.Left
        .Top = cellRng.Top
        .Width = cellRng.Width
        .Height = cellRng.Height
    End With
End Sub

'--- Excel VBA ---
Option Explicit

' ============================================
' 실행용 매크로
' ============================================

' 실행용 매크로 1: 비율 유지 모드 (권장)
Sub 실행_비율유지O()
    Call 도형을셀에맞추기(True)
End Sub

' 실행용 매크로 2: 비율 무시하고 셀 전체 채우기
Sub 실행_비율유지X()
    Call 도형을셀에맞추기(False)
End Sub

' 실행용 매크로 3: 비율 유지 + 압축 안내
Sub 실행_비율유지O_압축()
    Call 도형을셀에맞추기(True)
    Call 압축안내표시
End Sub

' 실행용 매크로 4: 비율 무시 + 압축 안내
Sub 실행_비율유지X_압축()
    Call 도형을셀에맞추기(False)
    Call 압축안내표시
End Sub

' 실행용 매크로 5: 압축 안내만 실행
Sub 실행_이미지압축만()
    Call 압축안내표시
End Sub

' ============================================
' 이미지 압축 안내 (이미지 크기 변경 없음)
' ============================================

' 압축 방법 안내 메시지 표시
Sub 압축안내표시()
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim compressCount As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    compressCount = 0
    
    ' 이미지 개수만 카운트 (크기 변경 없음)
    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If shp.Type = msoPicture Or shp.Type = msoLinkedPicture Then
            compressCount = compressCount + 1
        End If
    Next shp
    
    If compressCount > 0 Then
        MsgBox "이미지 " & compressCount & "개 감지됨" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "파일 용량 절감 방법:" & vbCrLf & _
               "1. 파일 > 다른 이름으로 저장" & vbCrLf & _
               "2. 도구 > 그림 압축 선택" & vbCrLf & _
               "3. '전자 메일용(96ppi)' 또는 '웹(150ppi)' 선택", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "이미지가 없습니다.", vbInformation
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

' ============================================
' 핵심 매크로 - 도형 배치
' ============================================

Sub 도형을셀에맞추기(Optional keepAspect As Boolean = True)

    Dim shp As Shape, cell As Range, rng As Range
    Dim usedRng As Range, maxOverlap As Double, curOverlap As Double
    Dim bestCell As Range

    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Set usedRng = ActiveSheet.UsedRange

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        maxOverlap = 0
        Set bestCell = Nothing

        ' 테두리가 있는 셀 중에서 가장 많이 겹친 셀 찾기
        For Each cell In usedRng.Cells
            ' 테두리가 있는 셀만 대상으로 함
            If 테두리있는셀인가(cell) Then
                Set rng = 유효범위가져오기(cell)
                curOverlap = 겹침계산(shp, rng)
                
                If curOverlap > maxOverlap Then
                    maxOverlap = curOverlap
                    Set bestCell = rng
                End If
            End If
        Next cell

        ' 해당 셀로 도형 이동 및 크기 조정
        If Not bestCell Is Nothing Then
            If keepAspect Then
                비율유지배치 shp, bestCell
            Else
                전체채우기배치 shp, bestCell
            End If
        End If
    Next shp

    MsgBox "모든 도형을 셀에 맞춰 자동 배치 완료!", vbInformation
    GoTo CleanExit

ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "오류 발생: " & Err.Description, vbCritical

CleanExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
End Sub

' 셀에 4면 테두리(박스)가 있는지 확인
Private Function 테두리있는셀인가(cell As Range) As Boolean
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim hasLeft As Boolean, hasRight As Boolean
    Dim hasTop As Boolean, hasBottom As Boolean
    
    ' 병합 셀이면 전체 영역, 아니면 해당 셀
    Set rng = 유효범위가져오기(cell)
    
    테두리있는셀인가 = False
    
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' 4면 테두리 각각 확인 (xlContinuous = 1)
    hasLeft = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle <> -4142)
    hasRight = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle <> -4142)

    End If

    Else

    End If

' 겹치는 면적 계산
Private Function 겹침계산(shp As Shape, rng As Range) As Double
    Dim shpL#, shpT#, shpR#, shpB#
    Dim rngL#, rngT#, rngR#, rngB#
    Dim ow#, oh#

    shpL = shp.Left: shpT = shp.Top
    shpR = shp.Left + shp.Width
    shpB = shp.Top + shp.Height

    rngL = rng.Left: rngT = rng.Top
    rngR = rng.Left + rng.Width
    rngB = rng.Top + rng.Height

    ow = Application.Max(0, Application.Min(shpR, rngR) - Application.Max(shpL, rngL))
    oh = Application.Max(0, Application.Min(shpB, rngB) - Application.Max(shpT, rngT))

    겹침계산 = ow * oh
End Function

' 비율 유지하며 셀에 최대 크기로 도형 배치
Private Sub 비율유지배치(shp As Shape, cellRng As Range)

    Dim cellW#, cellH#, ratio#, newW#, newH#
    Dim offsetL#, offsetT#

    cellW = cellRng.Width
    cellH = cellRng.Height

    ratio = shp.Width / shp.Height

    If cellW / cellH > ratio Then
        newH = cellH
        newW = cellH * ratio
    Else
        newW = cellW
        newH = cellW / ratio
    End If

    offsetL = cellRng.Left + (cellW - newW) / 2
    offsetT = cellRng.Top + (cellH - newH) / 2

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
        .Left = offsetL
        .Top = offsetT
        .Width = newW
        .Height = newH
    End With
End Sub

' 비율 무시하고 셀에 가득 채우기
Private Sub 전체채우기배치(shp As Shape, cellRng As Range)
    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
        .Left = cellRng.Left
        .Top = cellRng.Top
        .Width = cellRng.Width
        .Height = cellRng.Height
    End With
End Sub

Sub MR_ShowCompressInfo()
    Dim shp As Shape

    On Error Resume Next

        If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then
            pictureCount = pictureCount + 1

Private Sub MR_FitPicturesToTargets(Optional ByVal keepAspect As Boolean = True, Optional ByVal showMessage As Boolean = True)
    Const OVERLAP_THRESHOLD As Double = 0.15
    Const MAX_NEAREST_DISTANCE As Double = 420

    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim selectedNames As Object
    Dim useSelection As Boolean
    Dim found As Boolean
    Dim placedCount As Long
    Dim skippedCount As Long

    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Set selectedNames = MR_GetSelectedShapeNames()
    useSelection = (selectedNames.Count > 0)

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then
            If Not useSelection Or selectedNames.Exists(shp.Name) Then
                found = MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap(shp, target, OVERLAP_THRESHOLD)

                If Not found And useSelection Then
                    found = MR_FindNearestTarget(shp, target, MAX_NEAREST_DISTANCE)
                End If

                If found Then
                    If keepAspect Then
                        MR_PlaceKeepAspect shp, target
                    Else
                        MR_PlaceFill shp, target
                    End If
                    shp.ZOrder msoBringToFront
                    placedCount = placedCount + 1
                Else
                    skippedCount = skippedCount + 1
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp

    If showMessage Then
        If placedCount > 0 Then
            MsgBox "Picture placement complete: " & placedCount & " moved." & _
                   IIf(skippedCount > 0, vbCrLf & "Skipped: " & skippedCount, ""), vbInformation
        Else
            MsgBox "No matching picture target found. Select a picture near or over a bordered cell/box shape, then run again.", vbExclamation
        End If
    End If

CleanExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub

ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "Error: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanExit
End Sub

Private Function MR_GetSelectedShapeNames() As Object
    Dim names As Object
    Dim i As Long

    Set names = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

    On Error Resume Next
    For i = 1 To Selection.ShapeRange.Count
        names(Selection.ShapeRange(i).Name) = True
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0

    Set MR_GetSelectedShapeNames = names
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByVal threshold As Double) As Boolean
    Dim bestArea As Double
    Dim area As Double
    Dim score As Double
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox

    bestArea = 0
    MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = False

    If MR_FindBestCellTarget(img, target, area, score, threshold, True) Then
        bestArea = area
        result = target
        MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = True
    End If

    If MR_FindBestShapeTarget(img, target, area, score, threshold, True) Then
        If area > bestArea Then
            bestArea = area
            result = target
            MR_FindBestTargetByOverlap = True
        End If
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_FindNearestTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByVal maxDistance As Double) As Boolean
    Dim bestDistance As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox

    bestDistance = maxDistance
    MR_FindNearestTarget = False

    If MR_FindBestCellTarget(img, target, distance, 0, 0, False) Then
        If distance <= bestDistance Then
            bestDistance = distance
            result = target
            MR_FindNearestTarget = True
        End If
    End If

    If MR_FindBestShapeTarget(img, target, distance, 0, 0, False) Then
        If distance <= bestDistance Then
            bestDistance = distance
            result = target
            MR_FindNearestTarget = True
        End If
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestCellTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByRef metric As Double, ByRef score As Double, ByVal threshold As Double, ByVal byOverlap As Boolean) As Boolean
    Dim usedRng As Range
    Dim cell As Range
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim seen As Object
    Dim key As String
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim area As Double
    Dim candidateScore As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim bestMetric As Double

    On Error Resume Next
    Set usedRng = ActiveSheet.UsedRange
    On Error GoTo 0

    If usedRng Is Nothing Then Exit Function

    Set seen = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    MR_FindBestCellTarget = False

    If byOverlap Then
        bestMetric = 0
    Else
        bestMetric = 1E+30
    End If

    For Each cell In usedRng.Cells
        Set rng = MR_EffectiveRange(cell)
        key = rng.Address(False, False)

        If Not seen.Exists(key) Then
            seen.Add key, True

            If MR_HasBoxBorder(rng) Then
                MR_TargetFromRange target, rng

                If byOverlap Then
                    area = MR_OverlapArea(img, target)
                    candidateScore = MR_OverlapScore(img, target, area)
                    If candidateScore >= threshold And area > bestMetric Then
                        bestMetric = area
                        metric = area
                        score = candidateScore
                        result = target
                        MR_FindBestCellTarget = True
                    End If
                Else
                    distance = MR_CenterDistance(img, target)
                    If distance < bestMetric Then
                        bestMetric = distance
                        metric = distance
                        result = target
                        MR_FindBestCellTarget = True
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next cell
End Function

Private Function MR_FindBestShapeTarget(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef result As MR_TargetBox, ByRef metric As Double, ByRef score As Double, ByVal threshold As Double, ByVal byOverlap As Boolean) As Boolean
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim target As MR_TargetBox
    Dim area As Double
    Dim candidateScore As Double
    Dim distance As Double
    Dim bestMetric As Double

    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = False

    If byOverlap Then
        bestMetric = 0
    Else
        bestMetric = 1E+30
    End If

    For Each shp In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If shp.Name <> img.Name And MR_IsUsableTargetShape(shp, img) Then
            MR_TargetFromShape target, shp

            If byOverlap Then
                area = MR_OverlapArea(img, target)
                candidateScore = MR_OverlapScore(img, target, area)
                If candidateScore >= threshold And area > bestMetric Then
                    bestMetric = area
                    metric = area
                    score = candidateScore
                    result = target
                    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = True
                End If
            Else
                distance = MR_CenterDistance(img, target)
                If distance < bestMetric Then
                    bestMetric = distance
                    metric = distance
                    result = target
                    MR_FindBestShapeTarget = True
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
End Function

Private Function MR_IsPictureShape(ByVal shp As Shape) As Boolean
    MR_IsPictureShape = (shp.Type = msoPicture Or shp.Type = msoLinkedPicture)
End Function

Private Function MR_IsUsableTargetShape(ByVal shp As Shape, ByVal img As Shape) As Boolean
    Dim targetArea As Double
    Dim imageArea As Double

    MR_IsUsableTargetShape = False

    If shp.Visible = msoFalse Then Exit Function
    If MR_IsPictureShape(shp) Then Exit Function
    If shp.Type = msoGroup Then Exit Function
    If shp.Width < 5 Or shp.Height < 5 Then Exit Function

    targetArea = shp.Width * shp.Height
    imageArea = img.Width * img.Height

    If imageArea > 0 Then
        If targetArea < imageArea * 0.15 Then Exit Function
    End If

    MR_IsUsableTargetShape = True
End Function

Private Function MR_HasBoxBorder(ByVal rng As Range) As Boolean
    Dim hasLeft As Boolean
    Dim hasRight As Boolean
    Dim hasTop As Boolean
    Dim hasBottom As Boolean

    MR_HasBoxBorder = False

    On Error Resume Next
    hasLeft = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasRight = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasTop = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    hasBottom = (rng.Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle <> xlLineStyleNone)
    On Error GoTo 0

    MR_HasBoxBorder = (hasLeft And hasRight And hasTop And hasBottom)
End Function

Private Function MR_EffectiveRange(ByVal cell As Range) As Range
    If cell.MergeCells Then
        Set MR_EffectiveRange = cell.MergeArea
    Else
        Set MR_EffectiveRange = cell
    End If
End Function

Private Sub MR_TargetFromRange(ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal rng As Range)
    target.Left = rng.Left
    target.Top = rng.Top
    target.Width = rng.Width
    target.Height = rng.Height
    target.Source = "cell"
End Sub

Private Sub MR_TargetFromShape(ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal shp As Shape)
    target.Left = shp.Left
    target.Top = shp.Top
    target.Width = shp.Width
    target.Height = shp.Height
    target.Source = "shape"
End Sub

Private Function MR_OverlapArea(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As Double
    Dim leftEdge As Double
    Dim topEdge As Double
    Dim rightEdge As Double
    Dim bottomEdge As Double
    Dim imgRight As Double
    Dim imgBottom As Double
    Dim targetRight As Double
    Dim targetBottom As Double

    imgRight = img.Left + img.Width
    imgBottom = img.Top + img.Height
    targetRight = target.Left + target.Width
    targetBottom = target.Top + target.Height

    If img.Left > target.Left Then leftEdge = img.Left Else leftEdge = target.Left
    If img.Top > target.Top Then topEdge = img.Top Else topEdge = target.Top
    If imgRight < targetRight Then rightEdge = imgRight Else rightEdge = targetRight
    If imgBottom < targetBottom Then bottomEdge = imgBottom Else bottomEdge = targetBottom

    If rightEdge > leftEdge And bottomEdge > topEdge Then
        MR_OverlapArea = (rightEdge - leftEdge) * (bottomEdge - topEdge)
    Else
        MR_OverlapArea = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_OverlapScore(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal area As Double) As Double
    Dim imageArea As Double
    Dim targetArea As Double
    Dim baseArea As Double

    imageArea = img.Width * img.Height
    targetArea = target.Width * target.Height
    baseArea = imageArea
    If targetArea < baseArea Then baseArea = targetArea

    If baseArea > 0 Then
        MR_OverlapScore = area / baseArea
    Else
        MR_OverlapScore = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_CenterDistance(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As Double
    Dim imgX As Double
    Dim imgY As Double
    Dim targetX As Double
    Dim targetY As Double

    imgX = img.Left + img.Width / 2
    imgY = img.Top + img.Height / 2
    targetX = target.Left + target.Width / 2
    targetY = target.Top + target.Height / 2

    MR_CenterDistance = Sqr((imgX - targetX) ^ 2 + (imgY - targetY) ^ 2)
End Function

Private Sub MR_PlaceKeepAspect(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    Dim targetW As Double
    Dim targetH As Double
    Dim ratio As Double
    Dim newW As Double
    Dim newH As Double

    If shp.Height <= 0 Or target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    targetW = target.Width
    targetH = target.Height
    ratio = shp.Width / shp.Height

    If targetW / targetH > ratio Then
        newH = targetH
        newW = targetH * ratio
    Else
        newW = targetW
        newH = targetW / ratio
    End If

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
        .Width = newW
        .Height = newH
        .Left = target.Left + (targetW - newW) / 2
        .Top = target.Top + (targetH - newH) / 2
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub MR_PlaceFill(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    If target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
        .Left = target.Left
        .Top = target.Top
        .Width = target.Width
        .Height = target.Height
    End With
End Sub

    Dim bottomEdge As Double
    Dim imgRight As Double
    Dim imgBottom As Double
    Dim targetRight As Double
    Dim targetBottom As Double

    imgRight = img.Left + img.Width
    imgBottom = img.Top + img.Height
    targetRight = target.Left + target.Width
    targetBottom = target.Top + target.Height

    If img.Left > target.Left Then leftEdge = img.Left Else leftEdge = target.Left
    If img.Top > target.Top Then topEdge = img.Top Else topEdge = target.Top
    If imgRight < targetRight Then rightEdge = imgRight Else rightEdge = targetRight
    If imgBottom < targetBottom Then bottomEdge = imgBottom Else bottomEdge = targetBottom

    If rightEdge > leftEdge And bottomEdge > topEdge Then
        MR_OverlapArea = (rightEdge - leftEdge) * (bottomEdge - topEdge)
    Else
        MR_OverlapArea = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_OverlapScore(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox, ByVal area As Double) As Double
    Dim imageArea As Double
    Dim targetArea As Double
    Dim baseArea As Double

    imageArea = img.Width * img.Height
    targetArea = target.Width * target.Height
    baseArea = imageArea
    If targetArea < baseArea Then baseArea = targetArea

    If baseArea > 0 Then
        MR_OverlapScore = area / baseArea
    Else
        MR_OverlapScore = 0
    End If
End Function

Private Function MR_CenterDistance(ByVal img As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox) As Double
    Dim imgX As Double
    Dim imgY As Double
    Dim targetX As Double
    Dim targetY As Double

    imgX = img.Left + img.Width / 2
    imgY = img.Top + img.Height / 2
    targetX = target.Left + target.Width / 2
    targetY = target.Top + target.Height / 2

    MR_CenterDistance = Sqr((imgX - targetX) ^ 2 + (imgY - targetY) ^ 2)
End Function

Private Sub MR_PlaceKeepAspect(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    Dim targetW As Double
    Dim targetH As Double
    Dim ratio As Double
    Dim newW As Double
    Dim newH As Double

    If shp.Height <= 0 Or target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    targetW = target.Width
    targetH = target.Height
    ratio = shp.Width / shp.Height

    If targetW / targetH > ratio Then
        newH = targetH
        newW = targetH * ratio
    Else
        newW = targetW
        newH = targetW / ratio
    End If

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
        .Width = newW
        .Height = newH
        .Left = target.Left + (targetW - newW) / 2
        .Top = target.Top + (targetH - newH) / 2
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub MR_PlaceFill(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef target As MR_TargetBox)
    If target.Width <= 0 Or target.Height <= 0 Then Exit Sub

    With shp
        .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
        .Left = target.Left
        .Top = target.Top
        .Width = target.Width
        .Height = target.Height
    End With
End Sub

' 모든 이미지 압축 (저용량 저장)
Sub 전체이미지압축()
    Dim sld As Slide
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim compressCount As Long
    Dim totalSlides As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    compressCount = 0
    totalSlides = 0
    
    ' 모든 슬라이드의 이미지 처리
    For Each sld In ActivePresentation.Slides
        totalSlides = totalSlides + 1
        For Each shp In sld.Shapes
            If shp.Type = msoPicture Then
                compressCount = compressCount + 1
            End If
        Next shp
    Next sld
    
    If compressCount > 0 Then
        MsgBox "이미지 압축 처리 완료!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "처리된 슬라이드: " & totalSlides & "개" & vbCrLf & _
               "처리된 이미지: " & compressCount & "개" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "추가 용량 절감을 위해:" & vbCrLf & _
               "1. 파일 > 다른 이름으로 저장" & vbCrLf & _
               "2. 도구 > 그림 압축 선택" & vbCrLf & _
               "3. 원하는 해상도 선택 (권장: 웹 150ppi)", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "압축할 이미지가 없습니다.", vbInformation
    End If

' ============================================
' 내부 공용 실행 로직
' ============================================

' 셀 정보를 저장할 타입 (테이블 절대 좌표 포함)
Private Type CellInfo
    absLeft As Single
    absTop As Single
    cellWidth As Single
    cellHeight As Single
End Type

Private Sub 이미지자동배치실행(ByVal mode As Long, ByVal margin As Double)
    Const OVERLAP_THRESHOLD As Double = 0.3
    Const TAG_KEY As String = "AutoPlacedV2"

    Dim sld As Slide, i As Long
    Dim img As Shape
    Dim bestCell As CellInfo
    Dim found As Boolean

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    ' 현재 활성화된 슬라이드만 대상으로 함
    Set sld = ActiveWindow.View.Slide
    If sld Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "활성화된 슬라이드가 없습니다.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' --- 0) 이전 실행 태그 제거(현재 슬라이드에서만) ---
    For i = sld.Shapes.Count To 1 Step -1
        On Error Resume Next
        If sld.Shapes(i).Type = msoPicture Then
            If sld.Shapes(i).Tags(TAG_KEY) <> "" Then sld.Shapes(i).Tags.Delete TAG_KEY
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next i

    ' --- 1) 본 작업 (현재 슬라이드에서만) ---
    For i = sld.Shapes.Count To 1 Step -1
        Set img = sld.Shapes(i)
        If img.Type = msoPicture Then

            ' (A) 겹침 기준으로 대상 찾기 (절대 좌표 포함)
            found = 겹침기준대상찾기(sld, img, OVERLAP_THRESHOLD, bestCell)

            ' (C) 배치
            If found Then
                이미지대상에배치 img, bestCell, mode, margin
                img.ZOrder msoBringToFront
                On Error Resume Next
                img.Tags.Add TAG_KEY, "1"
                On Error GoTo 0
            End If

        End If
    Next i

    MsgBox "현재 슬라이드 이미지 배치 완료!", vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "오류가 발생했습니다: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ---------- 배치(3가지 모드: 무시/유지-채우기/유지-여백) ----------
Private Sub 이미지대상에배치(ByRef img As Shape, ByRef tgt As CellInfo, ByVal mode As Long, ByVal margin As Double)
    Dim tw As Single, th As Single, tl As Single, tt As Single
    Dim imgRatio As Double, tgtRatio As Double

    ' 절대 좌표 사용
    tw = tgt.cellWidth
    th = tgt.cellHeight
    tl = tgt.absLeft
    tt = tgt.absTop

    If margin > 0 Then
        tw = tw - 2 * margin
        th = th - 2 * margin
        tl = tl + margin
        tt = tt + margin
        If tw <= 0 Or th <= 0 Then Exit Sub
    End If

    Select Case mode
        Case 1 ' 비율 무시 사진 채우기
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
            img.Width = tw
            img.Height = th
            img.Left = tl
            img.Top = tt

        Case 2 ' 비율 유지 사진 채우기(cover)
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
            imgRatio = img.Width / img.Height
            tgtRatio = tw / th
            If imgRatio > tgtRatio Then
                img.Height = th
            Else
                img.Width = tw
            End If
            img.Left = tl + (tw - img.Width) / 2
            img.Top = tt + (th - img.Height) / 2

        Case 3 ' 테두리 영역 공백 입력(비율 무시, 여백 후 꽉 채우기)
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
            img.Width = tw
            img.Height = th
            img.Left = tl
            img.Top = tt
    End Select
End Sub

' ---------- (A) 겹침 기준 (절대 좌표 반환) ----------
Private Function 겹침기준대상찾기(ByVal sld As Slide, ByVal img As Shape, ByVal threshold As Double, ByRef result As CellInfo) As Boolean
    Dim shp As Shape, tbl As Table, r As Long, c As Long
    Dim bestArea As Double, area As Double, ratio As Double
    Dim candArea As Double
    Dim cellLeft As Single, cellTop As Single
    Dim cellW As Single, cellH As Single
    Dim tblLeft As Single, tblTop As Single
    
    bestArea = 0
    겹침기준대상찾기 = False

    For Each shp In sld.Shapes
        If shp.Name <> img.Name Then
            If shp.HasTable Then
                Set tbl = shp.Table
                tblLeft = shp.Left
                tblTop = shp.Top
                
                ' 테이블 셀 순회
                cellTop = tblTop
                For r = 1 To tbl.Rows.Count
                    cellLeft = tblLeft
                    cellH = tbl.Rows(r).Height
                    For c = 1 To tbl.Columns.Count
                        cellW = tbl.Columns(c).Width
                        
                        ' 절대 좌표로 겹침 면적 계산
                        area = 겹침면적계산절대(img, cellLeft, cellTop, cellW, cellH)
                        
                        candArea = cellW * cellH
                        If candArea > 0 Then
                            ratio = area / candArea
                        Else
                            ratio = 0
                        End If
                        
                        If ratio >= threshold And area > bestArea Then
                            bestArea = area
                            result.absLeft = cellLeft
                            result.absTop = cellTop
                            result.cellWidth = cellW
                            result.cellHeight = cellH
                            겹침기준대상찾기 = True
                        End If
                        
                        cellLeft = cellLeft + cellW
                    Next c
                    cellTop = cellTop + cellH
                Next r
            ElseIf shp.Type <> msoPicture And shp.Type <> msoPlaceholder Then
                ' 일반 도형은 Left/Top이 절대 좌표
                area = 겹침면적계산절대(img, shp.Left, shp.Top, shp.Width, shp.Height)

                candArea = shp.Width * shp.Height
                If candArea > 0 Then
                    ratio = area / candArea
                Else
                    ratio = 0
                End If

                If ratio >= threshold And area > bestArea Then
                    bestArea = area
                    result.absLeft = shp.Left
                    result.absTop = shp.Top
                    result.cellWidth = shp.Width
                    result.cellHeight = shp.Height
                    겹침기준대상찾기 = True
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
End Function

' ---------- 겹침 면적 (절대 좌표 기준) ----------
Private Function 겹침면적계산절대(img As Shape, targetLeft As Single, targetTop As Single, targetWidth As Single, targetHeight As Single) As Double
    Dim l As Double, t As Double, r As Double, btm As Double
    Dim imgRight As Double, imgBottom As Double
    Dim tgtRight As Double, tgtBottom As Double
    
    imgRight = img.Left + img.Width
    imgBottom = img.Top + img.Height
    tgtRight = targetLeft + targetWidth
    tgtBottom = targetTop + targetHeight
    
    ' 겹치는 영역의 좌상단
    If img.Left > targetLeft Then l = img.Left Else l = targetLeft
    If img.Top > targetTop Then t = img.Top Else t = targetTop
    
    ' 겹치는 영역의 우하단
    If imgRight < tgtRight Then r = imgRight Else r = tgtRight
    If imgBottom < tgtBottom Then btm = imgBottom Else btm = tgtBottom
    
    If r > l And btm > t Then
        겹침면적계산절대 = (r - l) * (btm - t)
    Else
        겹침면적계산절대 = 0
    End If
End Function

Option Explicit

Sub 이미지_비율무시_채우기()
    AutoPlaceImages_Run 1, 0
End Sub

Sub 이미지_비율유지_채우기()
    AutoPlaceImages_Run 2, 0
End Sub

Sub 이미지_여백맞춤()
    Dim marginInput As String
    Dim margin As Double
    marginInput = InputBox( _
        "테두리 안 여백(포인트)을 입력하세요." & vbCrLf & _
        "가로/세로 동일 수치로 적용됩니다." & vbCrLf & _
        "예: 10", _
        "여백 입력", "10")
    If marginInput = "" Then Exit Sub
    margin = CDbl(Val(marginInput))
    If margin < 0 Then margin = 0
    AutoPlaceImages_Run 3, margin
End Sub

' 내부 공용 실행 로직
Private Sub AutoPlaceImages_Run(ByVal mode As Long, ByVal margin As Double)
    Const OVERLAP_THRESHOLD As Double = 0.3
    Const TAG_KEY As String = "AutoPlacedV2"

    Dim sld As slide, i As Long
    Dim img As Shape, tgt As Shape

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    ' 현재 활성화된 슬라이드만 대상으로 함
    Set sld = ActiveWindow.View.Slide
    If sld Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "활성화된 슬라이드가 없습니다.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' --- 0) 이전 실행 태그 제거(현재 슬라이드에서만) ---
    For i = sld.Shapes.Count To 1 Step -1
        On Error Resume Next
        If sld.Shapes(i).Type = msoPicture Then
            If sld.Shapes(i).Tags(TAG_KEY) <> "" Then sld.Shapes(i).Tags.Delete TAG_KEY
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next i

    ' --- 1) 본 작업 (현재 슬라이드에서만) ---
    For i = sld.Shapes.Count To 1 Step -1
        Set img = sld.Shapes(i)
        If img.Type = msoPicture Then

            ' (A) 겹침 기준으로 대상 찾기
            Set tgt = FindBestTarget_ByOverlap(sld, img, OVERLAP_THRESHOLD)

            ' (B) 겹침 없으면 가장 가까운 타깃으로 Fallback (수정: 이 기능을 비활성화)
            ' If tgt Is Nothing Then Set tgt = FindBestTarget_ByDistance(sld, img)

            ' (C) 배치
            If Not tgt Is Nothing Then
                PlaceImageToTarget img, tgt, mode, margin
                img.ZOrder msoBringToFront
                On Error Resume Next
                img.Tags.Add TAG_KEY, "1" ' 이번 실행 표식(다음번에 다시 초기화됨)
                On Error GoTo 0
            End If

        End If
    Next i

    MsgBox "현재 슬라이드 이미지 배치 완료!", vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "오류가 발생했습니다: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ---------- 배치(3가지 모드: 무시/유지-채우기/유지-여백) ----------
Private Sub PlaceImageToTarget(ByRef img As Shape, ByRef tgt As Shape, ByVal mode As Long, ByVal margin As Double)
    Dim tw As Single, th As Single, tl As Single, tt As Single
    Dim imgRatio As Double, tgtRatio As Double

    ' 대상 영역 기본 값
    tw = tgt.Width
    th = tgt.Height
    tl = tgt.Left
    tt = tgt.Top

    ' 모드 3에서 사용하는 여백 적용(양쪽/상하 동일)
    If margin > 0 Then
        tw = tw - 2 * margin
        th = th - 2 * margin
        tl = tl + margin
        tt = tt + margin
        If tw <= 0 Or th <= 0 Then Exit Sub
    End If

    Select Case mode
        Case 1 ' 비율 무시 사진 채우기
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
            img.Width = tw
            img.Height = th
            img.Left = tl
            img.Top = tt

        Case 2 ' 비율 유지 사진 채우기(cover)
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoTrue
            imgRatio = img.Width / img.Height
            tgtRatio = tw / th
            If imgRatio > tgtRatio Then
                ' 더 가로로 긴 경우: 높이를 기준으로 채움
                img.Height = th
            Else
                ' 더 세로로 긴 경우: 너비를 기준으로 채움
                img.Width = tw
            End If
            img.Left = tl + (tw - img.Width) / 2
            img.Top = tt + (th - img.Height) / 2

        Case 3 ' 테두리 영역 공백 입력(비율 무시, 여백 후 꽉 채우기)
            img.LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
            img.Width = tw
            img.Height = th
            img.Left = tl
            img.Top = tt
    End Select
End Sub

' ---------- (A) 겹침 기준 ----------
Private Function FindBestTarget_ByOverlap(ByVal sld As slide, ByVal img As Shape, ByVal threshold As Double) As Shape
    Dim shp As Shape, tbl As Table, r As Long, c As Long
    Dim bestArea As Double, area As Double, ratio As Double, cand As Shape, candArea As Double
    bestArea = 0: Set FindBestTarget_ByOverlap = Nothing

    For Each shp In sld.Shapes
        If shp.Name <> img.Name Then
            If shp.HasTable Then
                Set tbl = shp.Table
                For r = 1 To tbl.Rows.Count
                    For c = 1 To tbl.Columns.Count
                        Set cand = tbl.cell(r, c).Shape
                        area = GetOverlapArea_NoWF(img, cand)
                        
                        ' 비율 계산 기준을 이미지(img)가 아닌 후보 도형(cand)으로 변경
                        candArea = cand.Width * cand.Height
                        If candArea > 0 Then
                            ratio = area / candArea
                        Else
                            ratio = 0
                        End If
                        
                        If ratio >= threshold And area > bestArea Then
                            bestArea = area: Set FindBestTarget_ByOverlap = cand
                        End If
                    Next c
                Next r
            ElseIf shp.Type <> msoPicture And shp.Type <> msoPlaceholder Then
                area = GetOverlapArea_NoWF(img, shp)

                ' 비율 계산 기준을 이미지(img)가 아닌 후보 도형(shp)으로 변경
                candArea = shp.Width * shp.Height
                If candArea > 0 Then
                    ratio = area / candArea
                Else
                    ratio = 0
                End If

                If ratio >= threshold And area > bestArea Then
                    bestArea = area: Set FindBestTarget_ByOverlap = shp
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
End Function

' ---------- (B) 거리 기준(Fallback) ----------
Private Function FindBestTarget_ByDistance(ByVal sld As slide, ByVal img As Shape) As Shape
    Dim shp As Shape, tbl As Table, r As Long, c As Long
    Dim bestDist As Double, d As Double, cand As Shape
    bestDist = 1E+30: Set FindBestTarget_ByDistance = Nothing

    For Each shp In sld.Shapes
        If shp.Name <> img.Name Then
            If shp.HasTable Then
                Set tbl = shp.Table
                For r = 1 To tbl.Rows.Count
                    For c = 1 To tbl.Columns.Count
                        Set cand = tbl.cell(r, c).Shape
                        d = CenterDistance(img, cand)
                        If d < bestDist Then bestDist = d: Set FindBestTarget_ByDistance = cand
                    Next c
                Next r
            ElseIf shp.Type <> msoPicture And shp.Type <> msoPlaceholder Then
                d = CenterDistance(img, shp)
                If d < bestDist Then bestDist = d: Set FindBestTarget_ByDistance = shp
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
End Function

' ---------- 겹침 면적(직접 비교) ----------
Private Function GetOverlapArea_NoWF(a As Shape, b As Shape) As Double
    Dim l As Double, t As Double, r As Double, btm As Double, ar As Double, br As Double
    If a.Left > b.Left Then l = a.Left Else l = b.Left
    If a.Top > b.Top Then t = a.Top Else t = b.Top
    ar = a.Left + a.Width: br = b.Left + b.Width
    If ar < br Then r = ar Else r = br
    ar = a.Top + a.Height: br = b.Top + b.Height
    If ar < br Then btm = ar Else btm = br
    If r > l And btm > t Then GetOverlapArea_NoWF = (r - l) * (btm - t) Else GetOverlapArea_NoWF = 0
End Function

' ---------- 중심 거리 ----------
Private Function CenterDistance(a As Shape, b As Shape) As Double
    Dim ax As Double, ay As Double, bx As Double, by As Double
    ax = a.Left + a.Width / 2: ay = a.Top + a.Height / 2
    bx = b.Left + b.Width / 2: by = b.Top + b.Height / 2
    CenterDistance = Sqr((ax - bx) ^ 2 + (ay - by) ^ 2)
End Function
